score_inputs.sector_adjustment_note: Hospitality and food-service markets are location-heavy, labor-heavy, and workflow-driven.

Food-service operations create recurring staffing, scheduling, and unit-level execution work.
Contractor markets create repeatable field-service coordination workflows.
The market already has a large national base of operating locations.
Average site size suggests many distributed operating units rather than a few giant locations.

entities.summary: Hospitality and food-service markets are location-heavy, labor-heavy, and workflow-driven. and the structure is fragmented enough to support a build-first wedge.
